creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
On Sun, 3 Oct 2010 18:10:06 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.ORG> wrote:
>
> Maintainer of sysutils/xfce4-cpugraph-plugin,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/151175 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/151175
> 

Approved with MAINTAINER change.

	-jr
